item.title: They are downplaying it because they can’t justify living in reality that this is burning the American citizens money#greenscree...
item.description:
They are downplaying it because they can’t justify living in reality that this is burning the American citizens money#greenscreenvideo

item.title: This is not a new phenomenon, but the performance and smugness of it really is incredible
item.description:
This is not a new phenomenon, but the performance and smugness of it really is incredible

item.title: Real reality catches up with them at some point and it seems it is finally catching up with them
item.description:

item.title: I support the liberation of all people, and it has been shown time and time again that productive liberatory narratives get hija...
item.description:
I support the liberation of all people, and it has been shown time and time again that productive liberatory narratives get hijacked and highlighted to support intervention and sanction that only serves the American empire



(Feed generated with FetchRSS)

item.title: It is not embarrassing it is telling and it is telling you that this movement, while perhaps having some legitimate causes origi...
item.description:
It is not embarrassing it is telling and it is telling you that this movement, while perhaps having some legitimate causes originally, has been instrumentalised and is primarily an instrument of western imperialism#greenscreenvideo
